body.title: Add formal evaluator pass to pe_chain separate from the executor model
body.result: Added pe_evaluate phase + pe_evaluator.py; wired into pe_close_loop pass path for two-model executor/evaluator split
body.description:
Current pe_chain uses the same model for both implementation and self-evaluation. From URL 8 (VentureBeat /goals): 'You can't trust a model to judge its own homework — the model doing the work is the worst judge of whether it's done.' Add a lightweight pe_evaluate phase after pe_test: checks original test plan goal conditions against what was built, using a cheaper model (Haiku-class). The evaluator makes exactly two decisions: done or not-done. If not done, return to implementation with failure context.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py (add pe_evaluate phase between pe_test and _pe_close), wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_evaluator.py (new)
**Design rules:** theigors/rules/coding, theigors/rules/budget (haiku-class model for binary decisions)
**Scope boundary:** In scope: pe_evaluate phase; haiku-class model; checking original test plan conditions. Out of scope: changing the test framework, adding new termination conditions beyond the ticket's test plan.
**Test plan:** Run pe_chain on ticket where tests pass but test plan has an additional behavioral check; verify evaluator catches gap. Run on fully-passing ticket; verify evaluator confirms done without looping.
